items.title: Max-margin hyperplane
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  dataNode["labeled points in feature space"]
  planeNode["decision hyperplane wTx + b = 0"]
  marginPosNode["margin boundary wTx + b = +1"]
  marginNegNode["margin boundary wTx + b = -1"]
  maxNode["maximize geometric margin 2/||w||"]
  dataNode --> planeNode
  planeNode --> marginPosNode
  planeNode --> marginNegNode
  marginPosNode --> maxNode
  marginNegNode --> maxNode
items.caption: SVM places the decision boundary midway between parallel margin hyperplanes and maximizes the distance between them.

items.title: Support vectors constrain the boundary
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  svPosNode["support vector class +1 on margin"]
  svNegNode["support vector class -1 on margin"]
  farNode["far point not a support vector"]
  boundaryNode["hyperplane wTx + b = 0"]
  svPosNode --> boundaryNode
  svNegNode --> boundaryNode
  farNode -.->|"removing does not move boundary"| boundaryNode
items.caption: Only support vectors on or inside the margin determine w and b; other training points can be discarded after training.

items.title: Soft margin slack
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  sepNode["separable ideal y(wTx+b) >= 1"]
  slackNode["slack xi >= 0 when y(wTx+b) < 1"]
  objNode["minimize ||w||^2 + C sum xi"]
  tuneNode["large C penalizes slack; small C allows wider margin"]
  sepNode --> slackNode
  slackNode --> objNode
  objNode --> tuneNode
items.caption: Soft-margin SVM pays a C-weighted penalty for points that violate the unit functional margin.
